project_type: C++17 AI assistant OS with REPL and Telegram bot
build_system: Makefile with clang++, single compilation unit via #include chains. mk_entry.cpp includes all modules. Test binary separately compiled from tests/test_main.cpp.
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp with TEST_ASSERT macros and RUN_TEST. Tests include modules via #include. Currently 10 tests, 74 assertions.
verification_instructions: 1) Run 'make' in MK_OS/ to confirm binary builds. 2) Run 'make test' to confirm all tests pass. 3) Check no new compilation warnings.
setup_instructions: clang++ with C++17 support, libcurl, libsqlite3 must be available. Build with 'make' in MK_OS/.
environment_constraints: Open internet. Linux sandbox (not macOS despite Makefile comment). clang++ and libraries available. No audio hardware for voice testing.
contribution_requirements: Each feature should leave system compilable. Step by step approach.
key_patterns: All modules are header-only .cpp files with #ifndef guards. mk_entry.cpp #includes them all into a single compilation unit. New modules must be added as #include in mk_entry.cpp. Knowledge stored as .mk files (source|relation|target|weight format). Tests in tests/test_main.cpp include modules directly. MKSystem struct in mk_entry.cpp holds all module instances. Commands handled in REPL loop with /command syntax. Natural language routed through MKSmartRouter.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the main project dir. ai_core/ has smart_router, preprocessor, persistent_memory, self_improver, neural_net. ai_core/hre/ has pattern_graph, deep_reasoner, reasoning_chains, composer, knowledge_files/. mk_brain/ has learning, memory, embeddings, vector_search, daily_briefing. plugins/ has telegram, manager. network/ has realtime_apis, search_engine. security/ has main_security, encrypted_shards. scheduler/ has mk_scheduler. system/ has mk_entry.cpp, daemon, shell, service_manager, diagnostics. tools/ has standalone utilities. tests/ has test_main.cpp.
